sections.text: Understand and control your data platform costs.
DSC Optimizer helps teams monitor, analyze, and optimize Snowflake usage so cloud spend stays predictable as data usage grows.
What DSC Optimizer Does

sections.html:
As data platforms scale, cloud costs become harder to understand and easier to mismanage. Usage patterns shift, workloads evolve, and small inefficiencies quietly turn into material spend.

DSC Optimizer ingests metadata from Snowflake and turns it into clear, actionable insight.

It provides visibility into how your data platform is being used today, highlights inefficiencies, and recommends changes that help teams control costs without disrupting analytics or operations.

 

This is not a billing export or a static cost report. It is a practical tool built to support ongoing cost awareness and optimization.
It provides visibility into how your data platform is being used today, highlights inefficiencies, and recommends changes that help teams control costs without disrupting analytics or operations.
This is not a billing export or a static cost report. It is a practical tool built to support ongoing cost awareness and optimization.

sections.text: Core Capabilities

Cost 
Visibility

sections.html: Interactive charts and dashboards show how Snowflake usage evolves over time, broken down by key drivers such as warehouses, queries, and workloads.

sections.text:
Usage 
Analysis

sections.html: Identify which queries, processes, and patterns are driving spend, including inefficient or underutilized resources.

sections.text: Optimization Recommendations

sections.html: Actionable recommendations highlight opportunities to reduce costs safely, such as resizing compute, adjusting scheduling, or cleaning up unused workloads.

sections.text: Designed for Operators

sections.html: Built for teams responsible for running data platforms, not just finance. Recommendations are practical, transparent, and grounded in how Snowflake actually works.

sections.text: Why We Built It

sections.html:
We built DSC Optimizer to solve a problem we see repeatedly in client environments.

 

Cloud data platforms make it easy to scale analytics, but much harder to maintain cost discipline over time. Teams often lack a clear view of how usage decisions translate into spend, especially as more users, tools, and workloads come online

Teams often lack a clear view of how usage decisions translate into spend, especially as more users, tools, and workloads come online. 

 

DSC Optimizer reflects how we approach cost optimization in our consulting work: understand usage first, make informed changes second, and avoid cost cutting that breaks trust in data.

Teams often lack a clear view of how usage decisions translate into spend, especially as more users, tools, and workloads come online. 

 

 DSC Optimizer reflects how we approach cost optimization in our consulting work: understand usage first, make informed changes second, and avoid cost cutting that breaks trust in data.

sections.text: Predictable Pricing
DSC Optimizer uses a simple flat rate pricing model designed for fast adoption, easy approvals, and long term trust.
Monthly Price:
$199 USD / month
Annual Commitment (Discounted):
$165 USD / month (billed annually)
What’s Included
What’s Coming Next
DSC Optimizer is designed to grow alongside modern data stacks.
Planned capabilities include:
Broader cloud and platform support beyond Snowflake
End to end lineage visibility linking data models, dashboards, and cost drivers
Integration with transformation and BI tools such as dbt and Looker
Monitoring and analysis of AI and LLM related data costs
Broader cloud and platform support beyond Snowflake
End to end lineage visibility linking data models, dashboards, and cost drivers
Integration with transformation and BI tools such as dbt and Looker
Monitoring and analysis of AI and LLM related data costs
The goal is a unified view of how data, analytics, and AI usage translate into real infrastructure spend
Who It’s For
DSC Optimizer is built for:
Data and analytics teams responsible for operating Snowflake
Engineering leaders managing cloud cost growth
Organizations scaling analytics and preparing for AI workloads
Teams that want proactive cost control rather than reactive billing reviews

DSC Optimizer is available as a subscription product.
